title: Ericoides tomentosum

It is traditionally used in various cultures to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Ericoides tomentosum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
